nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Langoree
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Langtree in Standish (Lancs), and perhaps occasionally from Langtree (Devon).

variants.name: Langtry
meanings: English: habitational name from Langtree in Lancashire, which is recorded as Longetrec. 1190, and perhaps occasionally from Langtree in Devon, which is recorded as Langetre in 1228. The placenames derive from Old English lang ‘long, tall’ + trēow ‘tree’.

nameMeanings.name: Eve
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name borne in the Bible by the first woman, created from one of Adam's ribs (Genesis 2:22). It derives, via Latin Eva, from Hebrew Havva, which is considered to be a variant of the vocabulary word hayya ‘living’ or ‘animal’. Adam gave names to all the animals (Genesis 2:19–20) and then to his wife, who was ‘the mother of all living’ (Genesis 3:20).

en.lifeSummary: Eve de Langoree was born in 1150, in Traînel, Aube, Grand Est, France. She married Gautier De La Ferté II in 1170, in La Ferté-Bernard, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in La Ferté-Bernard, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France.

Sie hat 1170 in La Ferté-Bernard, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich Gautier De La Ferté II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb in La Ferté-Bernard, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich.

ja.lifeSummary: Eve de Langoreeは1150年にフランスグランド エストアウベトラiネルで生まれた。1170年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーサルスラ フエルトe-バーナルドでGautier De La Ferté IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女はフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーサルスラ フエルトe-バーナルドで死去した。

ko.La Ferté-Bernard, Sarthe, Pays de la Loi: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 라 퍼트e-버나르드
ko.lifeSummary: Eve de Langoree(은)는 1150년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 오브 트라i넬에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1170년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 라 퍼트e-버나르드에서 Gautier De La Ferté II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 라 퍼트e-버나르드에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Eve de Langoree родилась в 1150 г. в местности траiнель, ауб, гранд эст, Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gautier De La Ferté II в 1170 г. в местности ла фиртe-бирнард, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности ла фиртe-бирнард, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.
